_comment: Single source of truth for every CURATED number in README.md. Benchmark results have no live API, so they live here and are injected by gen_readme.py into the <!-- AUTOGEN:key -->...<!-- /AUTOGEN:key --> regions. Provenance for each figure is in SOURCES.md. To update a number: edit its value here, then run `python gen_readme.py`. Values are stored with the exact literal characters used in README.md (Unicode middle-dot, arrow, degree, times) so regeneration is byte-for-byte. Live-API numbers (PyPI version + downloads, GitHub stars) are NOT in this file; they are shields.io badges that refresh on page view.

counts._note_open_source_repos: Curated, NOT the raw GitHub public_repos count. GitHub API reports 36 public repos but 13 are forks, leaving 23 original. '20+' is the honest conservative claim for original work. A live public_repos badge would show 36 and over-count forks, so this stays generator-driven.

splatreg.headline: **91.5%** official 3DMatch recall · splat-merge Chamfer **10.3 → 2.0 mm** vs naive concat · photometric refine **5° → 0.36°** where geometry under-constrains

mathlas.headline: Beats TheoremSearch on its own 110 human queries (**59.1 vs 45.0** Hit@20) · mathlib formal search **Hit@5 0.96** · zero false positives across every verification tier

hicache_pp.headline: Exact on the feature-ODE class: error stays **flat** across the skip horizon where polynomial bases diverge (4.7e-9 vs 6.5 at H=8) · `auto` detects basis misfit **120/120**

certflow.headline: Coverage at or above the claimed level on **every** reported condition including replayed METR-LA / PEMS-BAY traffic · 223 tests · 16 reproduction pipelines · 7 theorems including an impossibility result

hunyuan2_1.headline: DMD leads +0.13 F at i5, +0.24 at i6
